name: Skynet's AI Tax Agent Protocol (SATA Protocol)
description: Skynet's AI Tax Agent Protocol (SATA Protocol) is an autonomous crypto tax compliance copilot that ingests wallet/exported transaction activity, classifies events, applies jurisdiction-aware tax treatment, and generates transparent report artifacts for human and AI agentic review.
problemStatement: Crypto users across jurisdictions struggle to produce compliant, auditable tax records. Skynet addresses this by classifying on-chain/CSV activity and applying jurisdiction-aware tax logic with transparent assumptions.
conversationLog: See repository collaboration log in docs/collaboration-log.md for the complete human-agent build narrative, implementation milestones, and submission-readiness iterations.

submissionMetadata.intentionNotes: Continuing development of multi-jurisdiction crypto tax automation and evidence-backed filing assistance.
